resources.string: Xaqiijinta da\'da oo ammaan ah oo fudud
Bilow adiga oo ku daraya warqaddaada aqoonsiga ee xaqiijinta da\'da ee ugu horreysa
Xaqiijinta da\'da ee asturnaanta adoo isticmaalaya caddayn aqoon-la\'aan
Sii wad adoo Ingiriiska u isticmaalaya luqadda app-ka
Badhanka Beddel Luqadda, hadda wuxuu muujinayaa: %1$s. Taabo si aad luqad kale u doorato.
Waxaad tan bedeli kartaa dambe Goobaha
Ma jeclaan lahayd inaad habaynto astaamaha helitaanka sida cabbirka qoraalka, bartilmaameedyada taabashada, ama dhaqdhaqaaqa yaraanshaha?
Sii wad adoo isticmaalaya goobaha helitaanka caadiga ah
Fur goobaha helitaanka si aad u habaynto app-ka
Waxaad tan bedeli kartaa dambe Goobaha
Astaamaha la heli karo waxaa ka mid ah:
Waxaan awood u siinnay sharaxaadaha faahfaahsan si kaaga caawiso marin-habaynta app-ka.
Dejin hal-mar ah ayaa loo baahan yahay
Soo dejin ayaa loo baahan yahay
App-kani wuxuu u baahan yahay inuu soo dejisto qaybaha amniga ee caddayn aqoon-la\'aan (ku dhawaad 87 MB).
Boorsaddaadu waxay diyaar u tahay xaqiijinta da\'da ee ammaan ah
Diyaarinaya nidaamka xaqiijinta ee ammaan ah...
%1$d%% waa dhamaatay (%2$s MB oo ka mid ah %3$s MB ayaa la soo dejistay)
Tani waxay awood u siinaysaa caddayn aqoon-la\'aan ee xaqiijinta da\'da ee asturnaanta
Tani waxay ka qaadatay waqti ka badan inta la filayay
Dejintu laga yaabaa inay u dhacday. Isku day dib u bilaabashada.
App-ka wuu u baahan yahay inuu dib u bilaabo. Tan marmar waxay dhacaysaa markii la bilaabo markii ugu horreysa.
Bilaabaynta kaydka ayaa fashilantay. Fadlan dib u bilaab app-ka.
Bilaabaynta kaydka ayaa fashilantay. Fadlan xidid oo dib u bilaab app-ka.
Xor u gaar ugu yaraan 65 MB ka dibna isku day mar kale
Xaqiijinta da\'daadu waxay isticmaashaa caddayn aqoon-la\'aan. Taariikhda dhalashadaadu weligeed lama wadaagaan.
Warqaddaada aqoonsiga waa dhacday oo u baahan tahay in la beddelo
Warqadda Aqoonsiga Si Guul ah Ayaa Loo Kaydiyo
Warqaddaada aqoonsiga da\'da si ammaan ah ayaa loo kaydiyay waxayna diyaar u tahay isticmaalka
Hadda waxaad si gaar ah u xaqiijin kartaa da\'daada
Hel warqadda aqoonsiga ee bixiyaha la ogolaanshahay
Ka saar warqadda aqoonsiga ee hadda jirta
Taabo badhanka \'Xaqiiji Da\'da\' si aad u sawirto koodhyada QR ee xaqiijinta ee meelaha ka qaybgalaya.
Da\'daadu si gaar ah ayaa loo xaqiijiyay
Hadda waxaad ku noqon kartaa goobta si aad u sii wadato.
U fiirso kamiradda koodhka QR ee xaqiijinta
Haysato xasilloon ilaa aad maqasho codka xaqiijinta.
Tani laga yaabaa inay qaadato dhowr ilbiriqsi
Waxaan diyaarinayaa caddayn gaara adoo isticmaalaya warqaddaada aqoonsiga ee la kaydiyay.
Bixiyeyaasha la aaminsan yahay ee Australiya
Bixiyeyaasha si guul ah ayaa loo soo raray
Hubi xiriirkaaga internetka ka dibna isku day mar kale
Arag habaynta deegaanka ee hadda jirta
Dib u soo dej qaybaha amniga (debug)
Sii Warqadda Aqoonsiga Tijaabada ah Adigoo Bixiye
U sii warqad aqoonsi tijaabo ah boorsadaada si aad uga xaqiijin karto bandhig dhinac ku tiirsan.
Taabo 5 jeer si aad u beddesho
Dooro luqaddaada aad doorbideyso. App-ku wuu dib u bilaabi doonaa si uu isbeddelka u dabaqo.
App-ku wuu dib u bilaabi doonaa si uu luqaddaas u dabaqo.
Haddaad u booddid, app-ku wuxuu isticmaali doonaa Ingiriisiga default ahaan. Waxaad luqadda dambe bedeli kartaa Goobaha.
1. Isticmaal sanduuqa raadinta si aad luqaddaada u gasho
Luqaddaada nidaamka waxaa lagu muujiyaa korka haddii ay taageeran tahay.
Waxaad tan dambe bedeli kartaa Goobaha.
Isku day ereyga raadinta ee kala duwan
Luqado raadintaada u dhigma lama helin
Raadinta waa la nadiifiyay, waxaa muuqanaya dhammaan %d luqadood
Caawimada iyo macluumaadka ku saabsan xulashada luqadda
U bood xulashada luqadda oo isticmaal Ingiriisiga default ahaan
Dabaq xulashada luqadda oo sii wad
Dib ayaa loo noqday xulashada luqadda
Isticmaalaya deegaanka tijaabada. Taabo lambarka nooca shan jeer si aad u beddesho.
Samee warqadda aqoonsiga ee Sandbox si aad u tijaabiso socodka xaqiijinta adoon taaban xogta wax soo saarka.
Isticmaal taarikh saxsan halkii ay ka timaadeen default-ka ku salaysan da\'da.
Warqadda aqoonsiga tijaabada ayaa la kaydiyay
Falkan wuxuu ka saari doonaa warqadda aqoonsiga agabkaaga. Waxaad dib uga heli kartaa bixiyaha haddii loo baahdo.
Dialog waa la furay: Tirtir warqadda aqoonsiga
Furaha caddaynta iyo faylalka taageeraya waa la tirtiri doonaa waxaana dib loogu soo dejin doonaa markii xigta aad furto app-ka.
Dialog waa la furay: Dib u deji furaha caddaynta
Dialog waa la furay: Habaynta deegaanka

Adeegga helitaanka ee Provii Wallet wuxuu bixiyaa taageero horumarsan oo loogu talagalay isticmaalayaasha naafada. Tani waxaa ka mid ah akhrinta tooska ah ee warqadda aqoonsiga, marin-habaynta hageeysa, iyo falgalka fudud.
Dhammaan doorashada helitaanka waxay ku noqon doontaa default-kooda.
Ka saar dhidibka iyo saameynta dhalooyinka
Isticmaal foon-ta OpenDyslexic si loo horumariyo akhrisamaynta
U oggolow waqti dheeraad ah oo loogu talagalay ficilada waqtiga xaddidan
Qari doorashada horumarsan oo yaree kharaashka
U oggolow koodhyada QR inay la qoraan halkii laga sawiri lahaa
Awood u sii aqoonsiga hadalka ee goobaha qoraalka
Hagaaji meesha u dhexeysa safooyinka qoraalka
Talooyinka AAA: 1.5x kala-fogaanshaha safka, 2.0x kala-fogaanshaha cutubka, iyo 0.12em kala-fogaanshaha xarfaha.
Wakhtiga dhammaadka tooska ah kuma jiro buuxinta AAA
Hormar toos ah ka dib 30 ilbiriqsi
Hormar toos ah ka dib 60 ilbiriqsi
Dabeecadda wakhtiga dhammaadka ayaa loo dejiyay %s
Qaabka indho-la\'aanta midabka ayaa loo dejiyay %s
Ciyaar cod xaqiijin ah ka dib xaqiijinta guulaystay
Bixinta jawaabta taabashada ka dib xaqiijinta guulaystay
Codku wuxuu ixtiraamaa goobaha qaabka aamusnaan ee agabkaaga
Gali aqoonsigaaga sarkaalka ee la kuu qoondeeyay
Taabo YubiKey-gaaga si aad u xaqiijiso...
Xaqiiji adoo isticmaalaya HMAC (Hash-based Message Authentication Code)

1. Gali aqoonsigaaga Sarkaalka
2. Guji Xaqiiji
3. Taabo YubiKey markuu lama-yaab-lahaansho
4. Xaqiijinta HMAC (Hash-based Message Authentication Code) waxay xaqiijisaa aqoonsigaaga
Xaqiijintu waa fashilantay. Fadlan xaqiiji aqoonsigaaga Sarkaalka ka dibna isku day mar kale.
Xaqiiji aqoonsiga isticmaalaha oo bixinta warqadda aqoonsiga da\'da ee dijitaalka ah

1. Hubi dukumiintiga aqoonsiga jireed ee isticmaalaha
2. Gali taariikhda dhalashadda
3. Xaqiiji macluumaadka in uu si sax ah u waafaqsanaado
4. Bixinta warqadda aqoonsiga oo leh koodhka QR ee markhaatiga
5. Isticmaaluhu wuxuu sawiraa koodhka QR si uu u helayo warqadda aqoonsiga
Ka yar 18 - Lama bixin karo warqadda aqoonsiga
Waxaan aragnay aqoonsi dowladeed oo sax ah
Taariikhda dhalashadda si sax ah ayay u waafaqsantahay
Taariikhda Dhalashadda ee dukumiintiga jireed waa: %s
Isticmaaluhu Si Guul ah Ayuu U Sawiray
Shirqoolkaagu wuxuu dhammaan doonaa %d ilbiriqsi gudahood. Ma jeclaan lahayd inaad kaydiso horumarkaaga?
Digniin: Shirqoolkaagu wuxuu dhammaan doonaa %d ilbiriqsi gudahood
Ka yar 18 - Lama bixin karo warqadda aqoonsiga. Shakhsiyaadka 18 sano ama ka weyn oo kaliya ayaa u qalma warqadaha aqoonsiga da\'da. Fadlan xaqiiji taariikhda dhalashadda inay saxan tahay.
Waxaan aragnay aqoonsi dowladeed oo sax ah
Taariikhda dhalashadda si sax ah ayay u waafaqsantahay
Taariikhda Dhalashadda ee dukumiintiga jireed waa: %s
Tani waxay soo dejisaa warqaddaada aqoonsiga da\'da.
Bartilmaamedka koodhka QR gudaha fargeeyaha oo haysato xasilloon.
Koodhkan QR waa koodh xaqiijin. Fadlan sawir koodhka QR ee bixinta warqadda aqoonsiga.
Gali koodhka xaqiijinta ee 12 lambar ah ee la muujiyay shaashaddda xaqiijiyaha.
Qor koodhka la muujiyay shaashaddda bixiyaha.
Gelinta codda waa la heli karaa
Rukhsadda maqaarka ayaa loo baahan yahay
Gelinta codda waxay u baahan tahay helitaanka maqaarka. Waxaad ka awood u siin kartaa goobaha nidaamka.
Waqtiga shabakadda wuu dhacay. Isku day mar kale.
Hadalka lama ogaan. Fadlan isku day mar kale.
Gelinta codda waa mashquul. Fadlan sug.
Hadal lama maqlin. Fadlan si adag u hadal.
Khaladka gelinta codda. Fadlan isku day mar kale.
Isku Day Mar Kale Soo Dejinta
Dib u Deji oo Dib u Soo Dej
Rukhsadda kamiradda ayaa loo baahan yahay sawirista koodhka QR
Helitaanka kamiradda ayaa loo baahan yahay
Sii rukhsadda kamiradda si aad u sawirto koodhyada QR ama awood u sii gelinta gacanta ee goobaha helitaanka.
Rukhsadda kamiradda ayaa loo baahan yahay sawirista koodhyada QR
Rukhsadda kamiradda ayaa loo baahan yahay
Hormaris kamiradda ee sawirista koodhyada QR
Warqad aqoonsi lama helin. Fadlan marka hore hel warqadda aqoonsiga.
Waxaad leedahay warqado aqoonsi badan oo loo isticmaali karo xaqiijintaan. Fadlan dooro mid.
Khalad ayaa dhacay inta lagu jiro xaqiijinta
Xiriirku waqtigiisii dhacay. Fadlan isku day mar kale.
Lama xidhi karo. Fadlan hubi xiriirkaaga internetka.
Xiriirka ammaan ah ayaa fashilantay. Fadlan isku day mar kale.
Xaqiijinta amminimada ayaa fashilantay. Fadlan isku day mar kale.
Gelinta khaldan. Fadlan hubi macluumaadkaaga ka dibna isku day mar kale.
Howl kale waa socotaa. Fadlan sug.
Shuruudda da\'da warqaddan aqoonsiga kuma buuxin.
Xaqiijinta bayoolajiga ayaa loo baahan yahay si loo sii wado.
Boorsadda lama bilaabin. Fadlan dib u bilaab app-ka.
Khalad amminimo. Fadlan isku day mar kale.
Waqtiga xiriirka ayaa dhacay. Fadlan isku day mar kale.
Qaabka xogta khaldan. Fadlan isku day mar kale.
Khalad kaydka. Fadlan hubi kaydka agabka.
Taariikhda dhalashadaadu weligeed lama wadaagaan. Xaqiijiyeyaashu waxay ogaadaan oo kaliya haddaad buuxinayso shuruudda da\'dooda.
Xukun ururinta xogta oo maamul xogta

Provii Wallet waxay isticmaashaa caddayn aqoon-la\'aan si loogu xaqiijiyo da\'daada adoon muujin taariikhda dhalashadda. Xogta warqaddaada aqoonsiga agabkaaga oo kaliya ayaa lagu kaydiyay oo weligeed lama wadaagaan.
Caawi kobcinta Provii Wallet adoo wadaagaya xog isticmaal anonymous ah
Naga caawi hagaajinta khaladaadka adoo si toos ah u gudbinaya warbixinnada burburrinta
Warbixinta burburrinta waa la awood siiyay
Warbixinta burburrinta waa la awood dhimay
Taabo si aad wax ka baratid dhaqankaaga xogta
Waxa aan ururinno (haddii la awood siiyay):

- Xogta isticmaalka app-ka ee anonymous ah
- Warbixinnada burburrinta iyo diiwaanada khaladaadka
- Nooca agabka iyo nooca nidaamka
- Macluumaadka nooca app-ka

- Taariikhda dhalashadda
- Magacaaga ama faahfaahintaada shakhsiga
- Goobta aad joogto
- Xogta warqaddaada aqoonsiga
- Xogta bayoolajiga
Xogta warqaddaada aqoonsiga weligeed lama wadaagaan Provii ama dhinac kasta oo saddexaad. Agabkaaga ayay ku jirtaa.
Ka saar dhammaan warqadaha aqoonsiga iyo xogta la kaydiyay

Tani si joogto ah ayay u tirtiri doontaa dhammaan warqadahaada aqoonsiga iyo xogta app-ka ee agabkan. Waxaad u baahan doontaa inaad hesho warqadda aqoonsiga cusub si aad app-ka mar kale u isticmaasho.
Waxaad beddeli kartaa goobahan marka kasta. Isbeddeladu si degdeg ah ayay u dhaqangalaan.
Dialog xaqiijinta tirtiridda xogta waa la furay
Dialog macluumaadka uruurinta xogta waa la furay
Goobaha asturnaanta, xukun ururinta xogta oo maamul xogta
Sii Warqadda Aqoonsiga Tijaabada ah Adigoo Bixiye
Koodhka QR ee markhaatiga isticmaalaha in uu sawiro
Qoraalka caadiga ah oo leh ereyada farsamada
Erayada fudud iyo jumlada gaaban (waafaqsan AAA)
Hel caawimo ku saabsan astaamaha app-ka iyo helitaanka
Raadi mawduucyada caawimada oo wax ka baro astaamaha app-ka
Mawduuc caawimo lama helin oo raadintaada u dhigma
Baro sida loogu helayo warqaddaada aqoonsiga ee xaqiijinta da\'da ee ugu horreysa

Si aad u hesho warqaddaada aqoonsiga da'da:

1. Booqo goobta bixiyaha la ogolaanshahay
2. Soo geli ID-gaaga dowladeed
3. Sawir koodhka QR ee la bixiyay
4. Warqaddaada aqoonsiga si ammaan ah ayaa loo kaydin doonaa

Taariikhda dhalashadda si maxalli ah ayaa loo kaydiyaa weligeena lama wadaagaan.
Sida loo xaqiijiyo da\'daada adoon wadaagaynin macluumaadka shakhsiyeed

Marka aad u baahan tahay inaad xaqiijiso da'daada:

1. Xaqiijiyahu wuxuu kuu muujin doonaa koodh QR
2. Sawir adoo isticmaalaya app-ka
3. App-ku wuxuu abuuraa caddayn xisaab
4. Jawaabta haa/maya oo kaliya ayaa la wadaagaa

Taariikhda dhalashadda ee dhab ah WELIGEED lama muujin.

App-ku wuxuu ku jiraa astaamaha helitaanka badan:

- Qaabka qoraalka weyn iyo kala-duwanaanshaha sare
- Gelinta codda iyo taageero akhristayaasha shaashaddda
- Geesinimada fudud iyo xudunta
- Doorashooyinka gelinta koodhka gacanta
- Wakhtiyada dhammaadka balaarsan

Kuwan u gal Goobaha > Helitaanka

Asturnaantaadu waa mudnaanteena koowaad:

- Warqadaha aqoonsiga si maxalli ah ayaa loogu kaydiyaa agabkaaga
- Caddayn aqoon-la'aan ayaa ilaalinaya xogta
- Laguma raacin ama falanqayn
- Xaqiijinta bayoolajiga waa la heli karaa
- Xogtu weligeed agabkaaga ma tago adoon la mida ahayn

Dhibaatooyinka caadiga ah iyo hagaajintooda:

Sawirista QR kuma shaqeyneyso:
- Hubi rukhsadaha kamiradda Goobaha
- Isku day doorasho gelinta koodhka gacanta

Warqadda Aqoonsiga kuma Rarayneyso:
- Hubi xiriirkaaga internetka
- Isku day dib u dejinta furaha caddaynta

Xaqiijintu Waa Fashilantay:
- Xaqiiji warqadda aqoonsiga inaysan dhacin
- Xiriir la noqo xaqiijiyaha si aad u hesho taageero

Isku day raadinta:
• Helitaanka
• Goobaha
• Caawimada
• Luqadda
App-kani wuxuu isticmaashaa software-ka isha furan ee soo socda. Waxaan u mahadcelineynaa horumariyeyaasha abuuray maktabadahan.
Taabo si aad u aragto rukhsadda buuxda
Xiriir internet lama helin. Fadlan hubi shabakaddaada ka dibna isku day mar kale.
Khalad la filaayn ah ayaa dhacay. Fadlan dib u bilaab app-ka.
Khalad la filaayn ah ayaa dhacay. Fadlan isku day mar kale.
Xaq u leh ma ahan. Shuruudaha xaqiijintaan kuma buuxin.
Caqabaddu waa dhacday ama lama helin. Fadlan codsoo mid cusub.
Caqabaddani waa dhacday. Fadlan sawir koodh QR cusub.
Codsiga waa ka baxay amarka. Fadlan isku day mar kale.
Codsiyo badan. Fadlan sug waqti yar ka dibna isku day mar kale.
Khalad server-ka. Fadlan isku day dambe.
Codsigu wuu fashilmay (%d). Fadlan isku day mar kale.
Xaq u leh ma ahan xaqiijintaan
Xaqiijintu waa la joojiyay. Fadlan xaqiiji aqoonsigaaga si aad u dhammaystirto xaqiijinta da\'da.
Qaabka xogta khaldan. Fadlan isku day mar kale.
Khalad kaydka. Fadlan hubi kaydka agabka.
Samaynta caddaynta ayaa fashilantay. Fadlan isku day mar kale.
Xiriir internet lama helin. Fadlan hubi shabakaddaada.
Tani laga yaabaa inay qaadato dhowr ilbiriqsi
Da\'daadu si gaar ah ayaa loo xaqiijiyay
Hadda waxaad ku noqon kartaa goobta si aad u sii wadato.
Fadlan gali koodhka xaqiijinta. Koodhku waa inuu ahaado koodh gaaban oo 12 lambar ama URL buuxa oo xaqiijin ah oo ka timid xaqiijiyaha.
Khalad ayaa dhacay inta lagu jiro xaqiijinta
Ku Dar Warqadda Aqoonsiga ee La Maamulay
Ku dar warqadda aqoonsiga qof aad daryeelayso, sida ilmo.
Ma hubtaa inaad rabto inaad tirtirsid warqaddan aqoonsiga? Falkan lama beddeli karo.
Tirada Ugu Badan ee Warqadaha Aqoonsiga Waa La Gaaray
Tirada ugu badan ee warqadaha aqoonsiga ayaad gaaratay. Tirtir warqadda aqoonsiga ee jirta si aad cusub ugu darto.
Waxaad u socotaa inaad xaqiijiso da\'da adoo isticmaalaya warqadda aqoonsiga ee la maamulay ee %1$s.
Warqadda aqoonsiga ee %1$s waa la helay!
Warqadda aqoonsiga ilmahaaga si ammaan ah ayaa loo kaydiyay.
Ma hubtaa inaad rabto inaad tirtirsid warqaddan aqoonsiga ee la maamulay ee %1$s? Falkan lama beddeli karo. Waxaad u baahan doontaa inaad mar kale booqato bixiyaha si aad u beddesho.
Kaydinta magaca gaarka ah ayaa fashilantay
Tani waxay tirtiraysa warqaddaada aqoonsiga iyo warqadaha aqoonsiga ee la maamulay ee carruurta. Falkan lama beddeli karo.
✔ Da\'da si guul ah ayaa loo xaqiijiyay
Warqadda aqoonsiga lama helin. Fadlan marka hore dejiso warqaddaada aqoonsiga.
Khalad la filaayn ah ayaa dhacay
Warqadda aqoonsiga lama dooran. Fadlan isku day mar kale.
Warqado aqoonsi badan ayaa la heli karaa. Dooro mid loo isticmaalo xaqiijintaan.
Khalad ayaa dhacay inta lagu jiro xaqiijinta

1. Hubi dukumiintiga aqoonsiga jireed ee isticmaalaha
2. Gali taariikhda dhalashadda
3. Xaqiiji macluumaadka in uu si sax ah u waafaqsanaado
4. Bixinta warqadda aqoonsiga oo leh koodhka QR ee markhaatiga
5. Isticmaaluhu wuxuu sawiraa koodhka QR si uu u helayo warqadda aqoonsiga
Isticmaaluhu waa inuu sawiraa koodhkaan QR adoo isticmaalaya app-kiisa Provii Wallet
Warqadda aqoonsiga ayaa agabkooda lagu sameyn doonaa
Isticmaaluhu wuxuu dhammayn doonaa samaynta warqadda aqoonsiga agabkooda
Khalad la filaayn ah ayaa dhacay
Bixinta warqadda aqoonsiga ee ilaalinaysa asturnaanta
Tani laga yaabaa inay qaadato dhowr ilbiriqsi
Warqaddaada aqoonsiga da\'da xaqiijinta si ammaan ah ayaa loo kaydiyay
Markhaatiga la mida ah ayaa la hawlgalinayaa
Calaamadda guusha oo tilmaamaynaysa warqadda aqoonsiga la helay
Calaamadda khaladka oo tilmaamaynaysa bixintu fashilantay
Gali magac gaara si aad u kala saarto warqadaha aqoonsiga
Dooro cidda warqaddan aqoonsiga u tahay
Taabo YubiKey-gaaga si aad u xaqiijiso
Fadlan xaqiiji dukumiintiga iyo Taariikhda Dhalashadda inay waafaqsanyihiin
Isticmaaluhu waa inuu ahaa 18 ama ka weyn
Xaqiijin la\'aan. Fadlan marka hore gali ID-gaaga sarkaalka.
Dib u Deji oo Dib u Soo Dej
Qor koodhyada halkii la sawiri lahaa
Diiwaanka hore ee ku xidhan ee deegaanka Sandbox
Diiwaanka hore ee ku xidhan ee wax soo saarka
Bixiyaha Sandbox ee Provii ee rasmiga ah ee tijaabada
Bixiyaha warqadda aqoonsiga ee Provii ee rasmiga ah
Booqo xafiiska DMV ee maxalliga ah
Taariikhda dhalashaddu kuma noqon karto mustaqbalka
Koodhka QR waa aad u weyn yahay
Qaabka Sandbox Waa La Awood Siiyay\nIsticmaalaya deegaanka tijaabada
Qaabka Wax Soo Saarka Waa La Awood Siiyay\nIsticmaalaya deegaanka wax soo saarka
1 tallaabo ayaad ka jiraysaa qaabka horumariyaha
%1$d tallaabo ayaad ka jiraysaa qaabka horumariyaha
Waqtiga sugitaanka taabashada YubiKey ayaa dhacay. Fadlan taabo furaha markuu lama-yaab-lahaansho.
Jawaabta caqabadda kuma habayn goobtaan YubiKey
Slot 2 kuma habayn HMAC (Hash-based Message Authentication Code) SHA1 ee caqabadda-jawaabta
Xisaabinta HMAC (Hash-based Message Authentication Code) ayaa fashilantay: %s
Furaha caddaynta lama helin - fadlan dib u soo dej
Faylka furaha caddaynta lama akhriyi karo
Xusuusta waa dhammaatay - fadlan dib u bilaab app-ka
Cusbooneysiinta URL xaqiijiyaha (cinwaanka shabakadda) ayaa fashilantay! Waxaa la filayay %1$s laakiin waxaa la helay %2$s
Boorsaddu weli waa maran tahay ka dib bilaabaynta
Furaha caddaynta kuma jirto. Dejin ayaa loo baahan yahay.
Awood siiso qaabka Sandbox si aad u sameyso warqadaha aqoonsiga ee tijaabada
Lama keeni karo warqadaha aqoonsiga ee Sandbox. Fadlan hubi xiriirka internetka.
Xaqiiji aqoonsigaaga si aad u sameyso caddaynta da\'da
%1$s, %2$s, la ballaariyay, muujinaya qoraalka rukhsadda oo buuxa

Xukun saamiga kala-duwanaanshaha u dhexeeya qoraalka iyo asalka:

• Caadi: Midabada app-ka ee default
• Sare (AA): 4.5:1 saamiga kala-duwanaanshaha
• Ugu Sarreeya (AAA): 7:1+ saamiga kala-duwanaanshaha

Kala-duwanaanshaha sare wuxuu fududeeyaa akhrisamaynta qoraalka, gaar ahaan deegaanada iftiinka xoogga leh ama isticmaalayaasha aragga hoose.

Buuxinta WCAG AAA waxay u baahan tahay kala-duwanaanshaha ugu badan.

Waxay kordhinaysaa dhammaan cabbirada qoraalka 50% app-ka oo dhan.

Tani waxay fududeysaa akhrisamaynta isticmaalayaasha:
• Aragga hoose
• Isbeddellada aragga xiriira da'da
• Dhibaatooyinka akhrisamaynta

Waxay la bixisaa goobaha cabbirka foon-ta nidaamka si loogu helo kafaafka ugu badan.

Waxay ka saartaa daritaanka shafaafinta iyo saameynta dhidibka.

Fa'iidooyinka:
• Heerarchiyad muuqaal oo cad
• Akhrisamayn qoraal oo horumarsan
• Buuq muuqaal oo yaraanshay
• Culeys garasheed oo yaraanshay

Waxaa lagu talinayaa isticmaalayaasha aragga hoose ama dhibaatooyinka garashada.

Waxay hagaajisaa midabada noocyada kala duwan ee indho-la'aanta midabka:

• Protanopia: Indho-la'aanta cas
• Deuteranopia: Indho-la'aanta cagaaran
• Tritanopia: Indho-la'aanta buluug
• Mid-midab: Indho-la'aanta midabka oo dhamaanteed

Qaab kasta wuxuu isticmaashaa midabada si taxadar leh loo doortay oo kala sooci kara nooca gaar ah ee meesha la aamusay ee aragga midabka.

Waxay hagaajisaa kala-fogaanshaha u dhexeeya safooyinka qoraalka (1.0x - 2.0x).

• Default: 1.0x
• Waafaqsan AAA: 1.5x ama ka sare

Kala-fogaanshaha safka oo kordhay:
• Horumarinta fahamka akhrisamaynta
• Yarinta xanuunka indhaha
• Caawinta isticmaalayaasha buug-akhrisnimada
• Ka dhigidda qaybaha qoraalka inaysan yaraanin

Waxay hagaajisaa kala-fogaanshaha u dhexeeya cutubyadda (1.0x - 3.0x).

• Default: 1.0x
• Waafaqsan AAA: 2.0x ama ka sare

Kala-fogaanshaha cutubka oo kordhay:
• Si cad u kala soocidda fikradaha
• Horumarinta nidaamka muuqaalka
• Yarinta culaysyada garashada
• Caawinta xifaalida joogitaanka akhrisamaynta

Waxay hagaajisaa kala-fogaanshaha u dhexeeya xarfaha (0.0em - 0.2em).

• Default: 0.0em
• Waafaqsan AAA: 0.12em ama ka sare

Kala-fogaanshaha xarfaha oo kordhay:
• Ka dhigidda xarfaha kala goonida ah oo aad muuqato
• Caawinta isticmaalayaasha buug-akhrisnimada
• Horumarinta saxnaanta akhrisamaynta
• Yarinta khaladaadka xarfaha

Xaddida dhererka safka akhrisamaynta fudud:

• Ballaarada Buuxda: Xad maleh
• Raaxo: 80 xaraf (waxaa lagu talinayaa)
• Ciriiri: 60 xaraf

Baadhitaanku wuxuu muujinayaa akhrisan ugu habboon waxuu dhacaa 60-80 xaraf saff kasta. Safooyinka gaaban waxay yareyaan dhaqdhaqaaqa indha waxayna horumariyaan fahamka.

Waxay kordhinaysaa cabbirka ugu yaraan ee bartilmaameedka taabashada 60dp (ka 44dp).

Fa'iidooyinka:
• Fududaysa taabashada badhannada iyo xukumaadka
• Yarinta taabashada khaldan
• Caawinta isticmaalayaasha naafada dhaqdhaqaaqa
• Ka wanaajinta isticmaalka gacanta oo keliya

WCAG AAA waxay u baahan tahay ugu yaraan 60dp.

Waxay ka saartaa dhammaan dhaqdhaqaaqa iyo wareegista.

Fa'iidooyinka:
• Ka hortagga xanuunka socdaalka
• Yarinta digsi-la'aanta
• Yarinta culaysyada garashada
• Horumarinta xushmada

Waxaa lagu talinayaa isticmaalayaasha:
• Cudurrada vestibular
• Dhibaatooyinka xushmada
• Xasaasiyaha dhaqdhaqaaqa

Xukuma wakhtiga dhammaadka tooska ah ee shaashaadaha xaqiijinta:

• Waqti Dhammaad Midna (AAA): Waqti la'aan
• Caadi: 30 ilbiriqsi
• Balaarsan: 60 ilbiriqsi

WCAG AAA waxay u baahan tahay doorasho waqti dhammaad la'aan oo loogu talagalay isticmaalayaasha u baahan waqti dheeraad ah si ay u dhammaystiraan hawlaha.

Xogta foomka si toos ah ayaa loo kaydinayaa ka hor wakhtiyada dhammaadka.

Waxay ku beddelaysaa geesinimada kakanka ah kuwa fudud:

• Dhufo → Badhan taabo
• Riix muddo dheer → Taabo caadi oo xaqiijin leh
• Kaabi/dheri → Badhannada

Caawinta isticmaalayaasha:
• Naafada dhaqdhaqaaqa
• Gariirta
• La'aanta fudaydka
• Dhibaatooyinka shaashaddda taabashada

Bixinta gariirka ficilada.

Fa'iidooyinka:
• Xaqiijinta riixidda badhanka
• Muujinta khaladaadka
• Bixinta xaqiijinta taabashada

Waa la joojin karaa isticmaalayaasha:
• Oo ka soo horjeeda
• Oo leh xasaasiyaha dareenka
• Oo doortay hawlgalka aamusan

Si toos ah ayaa loo kaydinaa xogta foomka ka hor wakhtiyada dhammaadka.

Astaamaha:
• Digniin 10 ilbiriqsi ka hor wakhtiga dhammaadka
• Doorasho kaydinta ama diidmada xogta
• Dib u soo celin toos ah markaa noqoto
• Xifaalida xogta 24 saac

Waxay hubisaa in xog la' damin haddaad u baahan tahay waqti dheeraad ah ama aad kulmaan kacsi.

Yarinta kakan muuqaalka:

• Qaybaha UI ee ka yar ayaa la muujiyaa hal mar
• Badhannada waaweyn oo cad
• Meel bannaan oo dheeraad ah
• Qaababka fudud

Fa'iidooyinka:
• Fududaynta fahamka
• Yaraanshaha damaashaadka
• Xushmada horumarsan
• Culaysyada garashada oo yaraanshay

Muujinaya horumarinta socodka talaabada badan.

Waxay muujisaa:
• Lambarka tallaabada hadda
• Tirada guud ee tallaabada
• Muuqaalka horumarinta

Fa'iidooyinka:
• Yarinta welwelka
• Dejinta rajaynta cad
• Caawinta xifaalida jihaynta
• Muujinta horumarinta dhammaystirka

Bixinta macluumaadka dheeraad ah iyo sharaxaadaha:

• Calaamadaha badhanka ee dheeraad ah
• Tilmaannada faahfaahsan
• Xogeynta dheeraad ah
• Fariimaha khaladka ee cad

Caawinta isticmaalayaasha:
• Fahamka ficilada ka hor dadaalka
• Ka fogaanshaha khaladaadka
• Barashada hawlgalka app-ka
• Dhisidda kalsoonida

U baahan tahay xaqiijinta ficilada muhiimka ah:

• Tirtiridda warqadaha aqoonsiga
• Beddeli goobaha
• Nadiifinta xogta

WCAG AAA waxay u baahan tahay xaqiijin dhammaan ficilada burburinta.

Fa'iidooyinka:
• Ka hortagga xaadashada
• U oggolaanshaha dib u eegista ka hor ficilka
• Yarinta welwelka
• Bixinta fursadda labaad

Isticmaala luqadda fudud (Heerka Fasalka 7-9):

• Jumlada gaaban
• Erayada caadiga ah halkii loo isticmaali lahaa jargon-ka
• Luqadda cad oo toos ah
• Ereyada farsamada oo yaraanshay

Waafaqsan WCAG AAA markuu awood siiyay.

Fa'iidooyinka:
• Fududaynta fahamka
• Dhakhsiyaynta fahamka
• Ka wanaajinta kuwa aan Ingiriiska ku hadli jirin
• Culaysyada garashada oo yaraanshay

Caawimada xasaasiga ah ee macluumaadka oo ku jirta app-ka oo dhan.

Astaamaha:
• 27 mawduuc caawimo
• Xarunta caawimada la raadin karo
• Marin mawduucyada la xiriira
• Qaamuuska farsamada

Gelitaanka caawimada:
• Shaashaadaha goobaha
• Astaamaha kakanka ah
• Fariimaha khaladka
• Meel kasta oo aad aragto calaamadda caawimada

Geli xogta koodhka QR si gacanta ah halkii la sawiri lahaa.

Fa'iidooyinka:
• Waxay shaqeysaa marka helitaanka kamiradda aanay heli karin
• Caawinta isticmaalayaasha dhibaatada dhaqdhaqaaqa leh
• Ka wanaajinta iftiinka yar
• Ma baahna inaad qaboojisid telefoonka si xasilloon

Badal sawirista QR ee salaysan kamiradda.

Isticmaal cod si aad qoraal u geliso halkii la tiypo lahaa.

Fa'iidooyinka:
• Gelinta aan gacantu gaari
• Ka dhakhsiyaysii tiibinta
• Caawinta isticmaalayaasha naafada dhaqdhaqaaqa
• Yarinta xanuunka celceliska ah

Isticmaala aqoonsiga codka ee ku-dhisan agabkaaga.

Taageero buuxda oo loogu talagalay akhristaha shaashaddda TalkBack.

Astaamaha:
• Dhammaan qaybaha UI waa la calaamadeeyay
• Nidaamka madaxaha saxsan
• Amarka marin-habaynta macquulka ah
• Xogeynta gaarka ah ee ficilada kakanka ah

App-ku si toos ah wuxuu awood u siinayaa:
• Sharaxaadaha faahfaahsan
• Bartilmaameedyada taabashada oo balaarsan

markaa TalkBack la ogaado.

Profileyaasha helitaanka ee la habeeyay:

• Aragga Naafada: Kala-duwanaansho sare, qoraal weyn, gariir
• Dhaqdhaqaaqa Naafada: Bartilmaameedyo weyn, wakhtiyada dhammaadka balaarsan, xaqiijinnada
• Garashada: Xudunta fudud, muuqaalka tallaabada, sharaxaadaha
• Waayeelka: Qoraal weyn, bartilmaameedyo, xudunta fudud, dhaqdhaqaaqa yaraanshay
• Default: Dib u deji dhammaan goobaha

Profile kasta wuxuu awood u siinayaa goobaha ugu caawinta badan ee kooxda isticmaalaha. Waxaad gaara ku dheeraad ah u habeyn kartaa ka dib markaad dabaqdo profile.
Fadlan sug inta aan si ammaan ah uga xaqiijinayno da\'daada adoo isticmaalaya caddayn aqoon-la\'aan. Taariikhda dhalashadda weligeed lama wadaagaan xaqiijiyaha.
U fiirso kamiradda koodhka QR ee xaqiijinta. Koodhku si toos ah ayaa loo sawiri doonaa markuu la ogaado.
Da\'daadu si guul ah ayaa loo xaqiijiyay. Xaqiijiyuhu wuxuu ogaadaa inaad buuxinayso shuruudda da\'diisa adoon baranin taariikhda dhalashadda ee dhab ah.
Xaqiijintu waa fashilantay. Fadlan isku day sawirista koodhka QR mar kale ama isticmaal gelinta koodhka gacanta.
Sawir koodhka QR ee ay bixisay bixiyaha la ogolaanshahay si aad u hesho warqaddaada aqoonsiga da\'da ee dijitaalka ah.
U fiirso kamiradda koodhka QR ee bixinta ee ay muujisay sarkaalka. Warqaddaada aqoonsiga agabkaaga ayaa lagu sameyn doonaa.
Warqadda aqoonsiga si guul ah ayaa loo sameeyay. Hadda waxaad isticmaali kartaa warqaddaan aqoonsiga xaqiijinta da\'da.
Warqadda aqoonsiga waa caddayn cryptographic oo saxiixan oo aqoonsigaaga awood u siinaysa xaqiijinta ilaalinaysa asturnaanta.
Caddayn aqoon-la\'aan waxay kuu oggolaanaysaa inaad xaqiijiso inaad buuxinayso shuruudda da\'da adoon muujin da\'daada dhab ah.
Soo dejinaya furaha caddaynta cryptographic ee loo baahan yahay samaynta caddayn aqoon-la\'aan
Warqadda aqoonsiga lama helin. Fadlan marka hore ka hel bixiyaha la ogolaanshahay.
Xiriirka shabakadda ayaa fashilmay. Fadlan hubi xiriirkaaga internetka ka dibna isku day mar kale.
Koodhka QR ee khaldan. Fadlan hubi inaad sawiraysid koodhka xaqiijinta saxda ah.
Xaqiijintu waa fashilantay. Server-ku kuma awoodi karin xaqiijinta caddayntaada.
Gali taariikhda dhalashadda la xaqiijiyay ee codsadaha ee dukumiintigooda aqoonsiga rasmiga ah.
Ku soo dhawow Provii Wallet - xalkaaga xaqiijinta da\'da dijitaalka ah ee ilaalinaysa asturnaanta.
Taariikhda dhalashadda si ammaan ah ayaa loogu kaydisaa agabkaaga weligeednana lama gudbiyaan xaqiijiyeyaasha.
Si aad u bilaabato, booqo bixiyaha la ogolaanshahay si aad u hesho warqaddaada aqoonsiga da\'da ee dijitaalka ah.
Waxaan hubinayaa da\'daada. Taariikhda dhalashadda lama arki oo lama wadaagi doonto.
U fiirso kamiradda koodhka QR. Si toos ah ayuu u sawiri doonaa.
Guul! Goobtu waxay ogaatay inaad da\'da gaaray. Taariikhda dhalashadda ma garaneyso.
Tani kuma shaqeynin. Isku day sawirista mar kale ama qor koodhka halkiis.
Sawir koodhka xafiiska dowladda si aad u hesho ID-gaaga dijitaalka ah.
U fiirso kamiradda koodhka. ID-gaagu wuxuu ku badbaadi doonaa telefoonahaaga.
Dhamaystay! Hadda waxaad isticmaali kartaa ID-gaaga dijitaalka ah si aad u xaqiijiso da\'daada.
Warqadda aqoonsiga waxay u eg tahay kaaraha ID-ga dijitaalka ah ee xaqiijinaya cidda aad tahay adoon wadaagaynin faahfaahinta gaarka ah.
Waxaad xaqiijin kartaa inaad da\'da gaaratay adoon cidna u sheegaynin da\'daada dhab ah.
Soo dejinaya faylalka amniga ee loo baahan yahay app-ka inuu shaqeeyo
ID kuma lihid. Booqo xafiiska dowladda si aad marka hore u hesho.
Internetka ma xidhi karo. Hubi Wi-Fi ama xogta ka dibna isku day mar kale.
Koodhkaas ma uu u muuqdo sax. Hubi inaad sawiraysid koodhka saxda ah.
Tani kuma shaqeynin. Goobtu kuma hubsan kartid caddayntaada. Isku day mar kale.
Gali taariikhda dhalashadda qofka aqoonsigoodda rasmiga ah.
Ku soo dhawow Provii Wallet - xaqiiji da\'daada si gaar ah.
Taariikhda dhalashaddu telefoonahaaga ayay ku jirtaa. Cidna kale kuma arki karto.
Si aad u bilaabato, booqo xafiiska dowladda si aad u hesho ID-gaaga dijitaalka ah.
Fure-habayntan waxay ku shaqeeyaan app-ka oo dhan oo leh kiiboodhyada dibadda
Kiiboodhyada Bluetooth iyo USB ee dibadda si buuxda ayaa loo taageeraa
Isticmaal fure-jihada si aad u maraysid shayada liisaska
Haysato Ctrl si aad u aragto fure-gaabanka la heli karo shaashadddan
Dhammaan astaamaha app-kani kiiboodhka ayaa loo geli karaa
Dhaqdhaq xushmada curinta falgalka ee xigta
Dhaqdhaq xushmada curinta falgalka ee hore
Firfircooneysi badhanka la xushmeeyo ama gudbi foom
Firfircooneysi badhanka hadda la xushmeeyo ama beddelka
Dialog waa la furay. Riix Escape si aad u xidho, riix Enter si aad u xaqiijiso.
Laba jeer taabo si aad u xaqiijiso, ama riix Enter
Laba jeer taabo si aad u joojiso, ama riix Escape
Laba jeer taabo si aad u fuliso ficilada burburinta
Laba jeer taabo si aad u fuliso ficilka
Hore ayaad u haysatay warqad aqoonsi shakhsi ah. Samaynta mid cusub ayaa beddeli doonta tii hore. Tan dib looma noqon karo.
U fiirso kamiradda koodhka QR ee uu sarkaalku ku muujinayo
Koodhkan QR ma aha mid xanbaarsan xog markhaatinimo
Kani waa koodh QR xaqiijineed, oo aan ahayn koodh QR oo warqad aqoonsi

App-kani wuxuu u baahan yahay xidhiidhinta shaashadda (PIN, qaab, ama bayoolajiyad) si si ammaan ah loogu kaydiyo warqadaha aqoonsiga. Fadlan mid ka samee dejinta ammaanka qalabkaaga ka hor inta aanad sii wadin.
Xidhiidhinta Shaashadda Ayaa Loo Baahan Yahay
Caqabad sandbox ah ayaa la helay. Dooro inaad damaaniso qaabka sandbox oo aad sii wado, ama aad diido caqabadda.
Caqabaddan waxaa soo saaray xaqiijiye sandbox ah. Ma guulaysan doonto ilaa aad ka damaaniso qaabka sandbox boorsadan.
Kaydinta magaca gaarka ah way fashilantay
%1$d warqadood oo aqoonsi ah ayaa la muujiyay
Ma jiraan warqado aqoonsi oo u dhigma
Xidhiidh sandbox ah ayaa la helay. Dooro inaad damaaniso qaabka sandbox oo aad furto xidhiidhka.
Xidhiidhkani wuxuu kaliya ku guulaysan doonaa haddii aad ka damaaniso qaabka sandbox boorsadan.
Hel app ka qaybqaata. Ka hel warqad aqoonsi shirkaddaada hawlgabka, bangiga, telcoga, caymiska caafimaadka, ama qof kasta oo hore u ogaa da\'daada.
Ka hel warqad aqoonsi shirkaddaada hawlgabka, bangiga, telcoga, caymiska caafimaadka, ama qof kasta oo hore u ogaa da\'daada
Hel goob kuu dhow. Booqo shakhsi ahaan adoo wata aqoonsigaaga si aad u hesho warqad aqoonsi.
Booqo shakhsi ahaan adoo wata aqoonsigaaga si aad u hesho warqad aqoonsi
Waxaan daryeelaa qof. Maamul warqadaha aqoonsiga ee dadka aad daryeesho.
Maamul warqadaha aqoonsiga ee dadka aad daryeesho
Waxaan haystaa koodh QR oo la sawiro. Xaqiijiye ayaa ku siiyay koodh ka dib markii uu arkay aqoonsigaaga.
Xaqiijiye ayaa ku siiyay koodh ka dib markii uu arkay aqoonsigaaga
Waxaan haystaa koodh QR oo la sawiro
Dooro sida aad u jeclaan lahayd inaad u heshid warqaddaada aqoonsiga ee ugu horreysa
Xidhiidhinta shaashadda (PIN, qaab, ama bayoolajiyad) ayaa loo baahan yahay si si ammaan ah loogu kaydiyo warqadaha aqoonsiga. Fadlan mid ka samee dejinta qalabkaaga.
Hubi mar dambe iyadoo app-yo badan ay taageerayaan Provii
Weli ma jiraan app-yo ka qaybqaata
Hubi mar dambe iyadoo goobo dheeraad ah lagu daro

Si aad u heshid warqad aqoonsi la maamulo qof aad daryeesho, booqo goob ka qaybqaata oo wadajir ah. Xaqiijiyaha ayaa arki doona aqoonsigooda. Marka aad sawirto koodhka QR, waxaa lagu weydiin doonaa in warqaddaan aqoonsiga ay tahay tayada ama qof aad maamusho.
Hore ayaan u haystaa koodh QR
Warqadda aqoonsiga la maamulo waa la kaydiyay (%s)
Qaabka sandbox hadda waa firfircoon yahay. Boorsadu waxay ku xidhan tahay server-rada sandbox.
Sii warqaddan aqoonsiga magac si aad uga aqoonsato boorsadaada.
Magac gaar ah ayaa loogu baahan yahay warqadaha aqoonsiga la maamulo
Koodhkan QR waxaa loogu talagalay helitaanka warqad aqoonsi cusub, oo ma aha xaqiijinta da\'da. Ma jeclaan lahayd inaad halkii aaddo shaashadda markhaatinimada?
Koodhka QR ee Markhaatinimada Ayaa La Helay

Warqaddaada aqoonsiga waxay xanbaarsan tahay da\'daada. Wax kale ma jiraan. Magacaaga maaha, cinwaankaaga maaha, aqoonsigaaga maaha.\n\nWaxay caddaynaysaa inaad ka weyn tahay (ama ka yar tahay) da\' gaar ah iyadoon la muujin taariikhdaada dhalashadda.

Waxaad ka heli kartaa warqad aqoonsi app uu leeyahay shirkad hore u ogaa da\'daada. Tusaale ahaan, bangigaaga ama sanduuqaaga hawlgabka. Sababtoo ah hore ayay u xaqiijiyeen da\'daada, wax dheeraad ah looma baahna in la wadaago.\n\nSi kale, booqo goob ka qaybqaata adoo wata aqoonsi caddaynaya taariikhda dhalashadahaaga. Taariikhda dhalashadahaaga waa la arkaa, waxaa loo isticmaalaa samaynta warqaddaada aqoonsiga, ka dibna waa la tuuraa. Bixiyaha weligii ma arko warqaddaada aqoonsiga. Aqoonsigaaga weligii lalama xidho.

Haddii aad daryeesho qof u baahan warqad aqoonsi da', waxaad u heli kartaa oo aad ku maamuli kartaa qalabkaaga.

Booqo goob ka qaybqaata wadajir adoo wata aqoonsi caddaynaya taariikhda dhalashadooda. Marka aad sawirto koodhka QR, waxaa lagu weydiin doonaa in warqaddaan aqoonsiga ay tahay tayada ama qof aad maamusho.

Ku dar magac gaar ah si aad u kala saari karto warqadahooda aqoonsiga.

App raadinaya inuu xaqiijiyo da'daada wuxuu si toos ah caqabad ugu diri karaa boorsadaada Provii. Waxaad doorataa warqadda aqoonsiga ee la isticmaalo. Marka xaqiijintu si guul leh u dhammaato, waxaa laguu celin doonaa app-ka codsanayey, waxaadna u sii socon kartaa adigoo la xaqiijiyay.

Si kale, waxaa lagugu muujin karaa koodh QR oo qalab kale ku jira, ama xidhiidh ku jira browser-kaaga mobilada oo si toos ah u tagaya boorsadaada. Waxaa sidoo kale jira doorashada koodhka gaaban ee helitaanka.

Macluumaad shakhsi ah weligood lama wadaago. Kaliya jawaab haa ama maya ah haddii aad buuxiso shuruudaha da'da.

Tallaabadaada koowaad waa inaad heshid warqad aqoonsi app ka qaybqaata ama goob kuu dhow.\n\nHalkaa waxaad ka xaqiijin kartaa da\'daada mar kasta oo loo baahdo, iyadoon la wadaagin macluumaad shakhsi ah. Sidoo kale waxaad u maamuli kartaa warqadaha aqoonsiga dadka aad daryeesho.
Could not save your progress. Encrypted storage is unavailable. You can continue without saving.

A security issue has been detected on this device. Credential access is restricted to protect your data. Please ensure the device is not rooted, no instrumentation frameworks are running, and the application has not been tampered with. Restart the app after resolving the issue.
A way to prove something is true without revealing the actual information.
A digital proof of your identity stored on your device.
A trusted authority that creates and signs your credential.
A website or service that checks if you meet an age requirement.
A square barcode that contains information you can scan with your camera.
A mathematical way to hide information while still allowing proofs about it.
A proof that a number falls within a certain range without revealing the number.
A request from a verifier asking you to prove something about your age.
A way to commit to information that can be revealed and verified later.
A mathematical proof that a document came from a specific source and hasn\'t been altered.
Technology that protects your personal information while still allowing verification.
Cryptographic data needed to generate zero-knowledge proofs.
Cryptographic data used by verifiers to check proofs.
A single age verification attempt from start to finish.
Encryption that allows mathematical operations on encrypted data.
An organization authorized to verify identities and issue credentials.

A zero-knowledge proof is a cryptographic method where one party (the prover) can prove to another party (the verifier) that a statement is true, without revealing any information beyond the validity of the statement itself.

Example: You can prove you're over 21 without showing your exact age or date of birth.

This is the core technology that makes Provii Wallet privacy-preserving. When you verify your age, the verifier learns only that you meet their requirement (e.g., "over 18"), not your actual age or date of birth.

A credential is a cryptographically signed piece of information that proves an attribute about you. In Provii Wallet, your credential contains your date of birth in an encrypted form.

Key properties:
• Stored only on your device
• Never transmitted to verifiers
• Used to generate zero-knowledge proofs
• Issued by trusted authorities
• Cannot be forged or modified

Think of it as a digital version of your ID card, but one that allows you to prove specific facts (like "over 18") without showing the whole card.

An issuer is an organization authorized to verify your identity and create digital credentials. This could be a government agency, DMV office, or other trusted institution.

The issuer's role:
• Verifies your identity in person
• Checks official documents (passport, driver's license)
• Creates your digital credential
• Signs it cryptographically
• Helps you store it on your device

The issuer only needs to verify you once. After that, you can use your credential to verify your age as many times as needed without involving the issuer again.

A verifier is any website, app, or service that needs to confirm you meet an age requirement. Examples include:
• Websites selling age-restricted products
• Online services with age requirements
• Apps with age-gated content

What the verifier learns:
• Only whether you meet their requirement (yes/no)
• Nothing about your actual age
• Nothing about your date of birth
• Nothing that could identify you

The verifier receives a cryptographic proof that is mathematically valid but reveals no personal information beyond the yes/no answer to their specific age check.

A QR (Quick Response) code is a two-dimensional barcode that can store text, numbers, or web addresses. Provii Wallet uses QR codes in two ways:

1. Credential Issuance: Scan a code from the issuer to receive your credential
2. Age Verification: Scan a code from a verifier to start the verification process

QR codes are just a convenient way to transfer small amounts of data. If you have difficulty scanning QR codes, you can use the Manual Code Entry alternative input method to type the information instead.

A Pedersen commitment is a cryptographic technique that allows you to commit to a value without revealing it. It's like putting a number in a sealed envelope.

Properties:
• Hiding: No one can see what number is committed
• Binding: You can't change the number after committing
• Homomorphic: Allows mathematical operations on committed values

In Provii Wallet, your date of birth is stored as a Pedersen commitment. This allows you to prove facts about your age (like "over 18") without ever revealing your actual birth date.

A range proof is a type of zero-knowledge proof that demonstrates a committed value lies within a specific range, without revealing the actual value.

Example: Proving you're between 18 and 120 years old without revealing you're 25.

How Provii Wallet uses range proofs:
• To prove your age exceeds a minimum (e.g., 18, 21)
• Without revealing your exact age
• Without revealing your date of birth
• In a way that's mathematically verifiable

The verifier can be 100% certain the proof is valid, but learns nothing about your actual age beyond the yes/no answer.

A challenge is a request issued by a verifier that specifies:
• What needs to be proven (e.g., "over 18")
• A unique session identifier
• A cryptographic nonce (random number) for security

The challenge ensures:
• Each verification is unique and can't be reused
• The proof is tied to this specific verification session
• Replay attacks are prevented
• The verifier can trust the response

When you scan a QR code from a verifier, you're receiving a challenge. Your wallet then generates a zero-knowledge proof in response to that challenge.

A cryptographic commitment is like a sealed envelope - you can commit to a value without revealing it, and later prove what that value was without the ability to change it.

Two key properties:
1. Hiding: The commitment doesn't reveal the value
2. Binding: You can't change the value after committing

Your age credential uses commitments to hide your date of birth while still allowing you to prove facts about your age. The commitment is created when you receive your credential from the issuer.

A digital signature is a cryptographic technique that proves:
• Who created or authorized a document
• The document hasn't been modified since signing
• The signer cannot deny having signed it

In Provii Wallet:
• The issuer digitally signs your credential
• This proves the credential is authentic
• It prevents anyone from creating fake credentials
• It ensures your credential hasn't been tampered with

Digital signatures are the digital equivalent of handwritten signatures, but much more secure and verifiable.

Privacy-preserving means the system is designed from the ground up to minimize data exposure and protect your personal information.

Provii Wallet's privacy-preserving features:
• Zero-knowledge proofs reveal only yes/no answers
• Your date of birth never leaves your device
• Verifiers learn nothing about your actual age
• No tracking or profiling is possible
• No central database of verifications
• Each verification is unlinkable to others

Traditional age verification systems require you to show your full ID or date of birth. Privacy-preserving systems like Provii Wallet allow verification without revealing unnecessary information.

A proving key is public cryptographic data used to generate zero-knowledge proofs. It's like a recipe that tells your device how to create valid proofs.

Key facts:
• Public and safe to download
• Same for all users
• Required to generate proofs
• About 150-200MB in size
• Downloaded once and cached

The app downloads the proving key the first time you perform a verification. This is a one-time download that enables all future verifications.

A verification key is public cryptographic data that verifiers use to check if a zero-knowledge proof is valid. It's the counterpart to the proving key.

Key facts:
• Much smaller than proving key (~1KB)
• Public and widely distributed
• Verifiers have their own copy
• Ensures only valid proofs are accepted
• Same verification key for all users

When a verifier checks your proof, they use the verification key to mathematically confirm it's valid without learning anything about your actual age.

A session represents one complete age verification interaction:

1. Verifier creates a challenge
2. You scan the QR code
3. App generates a proof
4. Proof is submitted to verifier
5. Verifier checks proof and responds

Each session:
• Is unique and time-limited
• Has a unique identifier
• Cannot be reused or replayed
• Typically completes in seconds
• Leaves no persistent record

Sessions ensure security and prevent someone from reusing an old proof to bypass verification.

Homomorphic encryption is a special form of encryption that allows certain mathematical operations to be performed on encrypted data without decrypting it first.

Example: You can add two encrypted numbers and get an encrypted result that, when decrypted, equals the sum of the original numbers.

Provii Wallet uses homomorphic properties of Pedersen commitments to:
• Compare encrypted ages to threshold values
• Generate range proofs
• Perform age checks without revealing age

This is what enables zero-knowledge proofs to work - you can prove relationships between values without revealing the values themselves.

A trusted authority is an organization that:
• Has legal authority to verify identities
• Follows strict identity verification procedures
• Is trusted by verifiers to issue accurate credentials
• Maintains high security standards

Examples:
• Government agencies
• Department of Motor Vehicles (DMV)
• Passport offices
• Licensed identity verification services

The trust model ensures that:
• Only legitimate authorities can issue credentials
• Verifiers can trust the credentials are accurate
• Users have confidence in the system
• Fraud is prevented

You must visit a trusted authority in person to receive your initial credential.
